# opnsense_dhcpv4_subnet (Resource)
Manages a dhcpv4 subnet on OPNsense via the Kea DHCP server.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_dhcpv4_subnet" "lan" {
  subnet      = "10.0.0.0/24"
  pools       = "10.0.0.100-10.0.0.200"
  description = "LAN DHCP pool"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `subnet` (String) Subnet in CIDR notation (e.g., `10.0.0.0/24`).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `option_data` (String) DHCP option data (JSON-encoded Kea options).
- `pools` (String) Address pool range (e.g., `10.0.0.100-10.0.0.200`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_dhcpv4_subnet.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
